hotels.name: Hotel ZaZa Dallas
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Dallas, l'établissement de luxe Hotel ZaZa Dallas propose un spa à service complet prodiguant des massages et des soins de la peau. Vous profiterez d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.

Les chambres affichent une décoration de style méditerranéen, avec des œuvres d'art uniques. Elles comprennent un grand bureau, un canapé et un réfrigérateur, ainsi qu'une télévision par câble à écran plat.

Le restaurant insolite Dragonfly de l'Hotel ZaZa vous invite à vivre une expérience gastronomique raffinée. L'établissement comporte une salle de sport ultramoderne et une piscine. Le Poolside at ZaZa organise des animations tous les soirs et sert des cocktails. L'Art House and Social Gallery accueille des dîners privés, des événements sociaux et des expositions d'art.
hotels.description_en:
A full-service spa featuring massages and skin treatments is available at this luxurious Dallas hotel. Free Wi-Fi is also provided.

Unique pieces of art and Mediterranean decor style each room at Hotel ZaZa Dallas. A spacious work desk, a sofa and a refrigerator are included for your convenience. There is also a flat-screen cable TV in every room.

The Dragonfly, Hotel ZaZa's extravagant restaurant, offers a fine dining experience. Exercise in the state-of-the-art fitness centre and then relax in the pool. Each night Poolside at ZaZa provides entertainment and serves cocktails. The Art House and Social Gallery hosts private dining, social events, and art exhibitions.

The Dallas Museum of Art and the Nasher Sculpture Center are 5 minutes' drive from the hotel.
hotels.description_es:
Este lujoso hotel de Dallas cuenta con un spa completo con servicios de masajes y de tratamientos dermatológicos. También proporciona WiFi gratis.

Todas las habitaciones del Hotel ZaZa Dallas presentan una decoración de estilo mediterráneo con obras de arte exclusivas. También disponen de escritorio amplio, sofá, nevera y TV de pantalla plana por cable.

El extravagante restaurante The Dragonfly del Hotel ZaZa ofrece una experiencia gastronómica de calidad. El establecimiento también cuenta con un centro de fitness de última generación y piscina. Además, todas las noches se organizan espectáculos y se sirven cócteles en el Poolside at ZaZa, mientras que la Art House and Social Gallery acoge exposiciones de arte, cenas privadas y eventos sociales.

Nelle camere dell’Hotel ZaZa Dallas troverete interni in stile mediterraneo con opere d’arte uniche, e comfort quali ampia scrivania, frigorifero, divano e TV via cavo a schermo piatto. Non manca poi una TV via cavo a schermo piatto in ogni sistemazione.

Il Dragonfly, l’originale ristorante dell’Hotel ZaZa, vi propone un’esperienza culinaria raffinata. Durante la permanenza potrete inoltre allenarvi nel centro fitness all’avanguardia e trascorrere piacevoli momenti di relax in piscina. This bed and breakfast offers a complimentary happy hour and free Wi-Fi. Guests can rent a bicycle and take a relaxing turn around scenic Key West streets.

Todos los alojamientos del The Artist House cuentan con TV de pantalla plana por cable, nevera pequeña, microondas y set de té y café.

Este bed and breakfast ofrece happy hour y WiFi gratuitas. También se facilita el préstamo de bicicletas para recorrer las calles de Key West.

El establecimiento está a 7 minutos a pie del Museo de Arte e Historia de Key West. Tanto la Casa Museo de Ernest Hemingway como el centro de conservación de mariposas de Key West se encuentran a menos de 1,6 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Este histórico alojamento de acomodação e pequeno-almoço de Key West fica a 1,6 km do ponto mais a sul e a 3 minutos a pé da icónica Duval Street. Os hóspedes do Artist House poderão desfrutar de um pequeno-almoço continental diário e de uma banheira de hidromassagem.

Todas as acomodações do The Artist House possuem uma televisão de ecrã plano por cabo, um pequeno frigorífico e micro-ondas. Também inclui comodidades para preparar chá e café.

Este alojamento de acomodação e pequeno-almoço disponibiliza uma happy hour gratuita e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito. Os hóspedes podem alugar uma bicicleta e dar um passeio relaxante em torno das cénicas ruas Key West.

O Museu de Arte e História de Key West fica a 7 minutos a pé da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Key West, a 1,6 km dal Southernmost Point e a 3 minuti a piedi dall'iconica Duval Street, lo storico bed & breakfast The Artist House offre una vasca idromassaggio termale e una colazione continentale servita ogni giorno.

Le sistemazioni dell'Artist House sono dotate di una TV via cavo a schermo piatto, di un frigorifero di piccole dimensioni, di un forno a microonde e di un set per la preparazione di tè e caffè in camera.

Come ospiti del bed & breakfast avrete gratuitamente a disposizione l'happy hour e la connessione WiFi, inoltre potrete noleggiare una bicicletta e andare alla scoperta delle strade panoramiche di Key West.

hotels.name: Orchid Key Inn - Adults Only
hotels.description_fr:
This historic Key West Orchid Key Inn - Adults Only is on Duval Street 3 minutes’ walk from the Ernest Hemingway House and Museum. Features include a daily continental breakfast, heated pool with a hot tub, and a bar.

A 42-inch flat-screen cable TV, microwave, and small refrigerator as well as an iPod dock are standard in each room. Extras include a Keurig® coffee machine, and some suites have a spa bath and a sofa bed.

A Complementary single welcome drink voucher upon check in.

The Orchid Bar serves specialty cocktails made with fresh herbs and infused spirits from early afternoon to late evening. Guests will receive 1 complimentary beverage per day.

The inn is 3 minutes’ walk from the Historic Lighthouse and 7 minutes’ walk from the Southernmost Point. Key West city centre is 1.

hotels.name: H2O Suites- Adults Only
hotels.description_fr:
Le H2O Suites est un établissement réservé aux adultes vous accueillant à Key West, à 200 mètres de la rue Duval. Il possède une piscine extérieure ouverte toute l'année sur le toit, une terrasse bien exposée et un bar sur place.

Les chambres du H2O Suites disposent d'une télévision à écran plat ainsi que d'une station d'accueil pour iPod. Offrant une vue sur la cour tropicale, elles sont dotées d'un coin salon. Certaines bénéficient d'une piscine privée. Elles comprennent une salle de bains privative pourvue de peignoirs, de chaussons et d'articles de toilette gratuits.

L'établissement vous offrira gracieusement un verre de bienvenue à l'arrivée ainsi qu'une Happy Hour. Il propose une réception ouverte 24h/24.
hotels.description_en:
This adult-only Key West H2O Suites is 200 metres from Duval Street and features a year-round outdoor rooftop pool with a sun terrace. Guests can enjoy the on-site bar.

A flat-screen TV, as well as an iPod docking station are featured. All rooms have a sitting are and view of the tropical courtyard. Certain rooms include a private pool. The rooms come with a private bathroom. Extras include bathrobes, slippers and free toiletries.

The property provides a free welcome drink upon arrival and a complimentary happy hour for everyone. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property.

The resort also offers bike hire. Southernmost Point is 400 metres from H2O Suites, while Ernest Hemingway Home and Museum is 500 metres from the property.
hotels.description_es:
Este hotel solo para adultos de Key West, el H2O Suites, está a 200 metros de la calle Duval y cuenta con una piscina al aire libre abierta durante todo el año en la azotea, que incluye solárium. El establecimiento también alberga un bar.

Las habitaciones incluyen TV de pantalla plana y soporte para iPod. Asimismo, proporcionan una zona de estar y vistas al patio tropical. Algunas incluyen una piscina privada y todas tienen baño privado con albornoces, zapatillas y artículos de aseo gratuitos.

El establecimiento ofrece una bebida de bienvenida gratis a la llegada y organiza happy hour gratuita para todos. La recepción abre las 24 horas.

Este complejo ofrece un servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.
hotels.description_pt:
Este Key West H2O Suites, apenas para adultos, fica a 200 metros da Duval Street e apresenta uma piscina ao ar livre durante todo o ano com um terraço. Os hóspedes beneficiam de um bar.

Inclui uma televisão de ecrã plano e uma base de ligação para iPod. Todos os quartos têm uma área de estar e vista do pátio tropical. Certos quartos incluem uma piscina privada. Os quartos dispõem de uma casa de banho privativa. Incluem ainda roupões de banho, chinelos e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos.

A propriedade oferece uma bebida de boas-vindas gratuita à chegada e uma happy hour de cortesia para todos. Há uma recepção 24 horas na propriedade.

O resort também providencia aluguer de bicicletas.
hotels.description_it:
Struttura per soli adulti situata a Key West, a soli 200 metri da Duval Street, l'H2O Suites offre un bar in loco e una piscina all'aperto all'ultimo piano con terrazza solarium, a disposizione tutto l'anno.

Tutte le camere presentano una TV a schermo piatto, una docking station per iPod, un'area salotto, la vista sul cortile tropicale e un bagno privato con accappatoi, pantofole e set di cortesia. Alcuni alloggi sono provvisti di piscina privata.

La struttura mette a vostra disposizione una reception aperta 24 ore su 24 e servizi gratuiti, tra cui un drink di benvenuto all'arrivo e un happy hour per tutti.

hotels.name: Aldrich Guest House
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Aldrich Guest House se situe à Galena, à 26 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Casino Diamond Jo. Il possède la climatisation, une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, ainsi qu’une terrasse.

Vous trouverez une salle de bains privative avec une douche dans chaque logement, tout comme des articles de toilette gratuits, un sèche-cheveux et des peignoirs.

Un petit-déjeuner végétarien, végétalien ou sans gluten est servi sur place.

Après une journée de randonnée, de ski ou de vélo, vous pourrez vous détendre dans le jardin ou dans le salon commun.

Vous séjournerez à proximité de ces lieux d’intérêt : Belvedere Mansion, Galena Historic District et Galena-Jo Daviess County History Museum. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport régional de Dubuque) est à 36 km.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Historic Setting: Aldrich Guest House in Galena offers a unique experience within a historic building. The adults-only property features a beautiful garden and terrace, complemented by free WiFi throughout.

Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms include air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, and garden views. Additional amenities include bathrobes, free toiletries, and parquet floors, ensuring a relaxing stay.

Dining Experience: Guests can enjoy a variety of breakfast options, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free choices. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, and juice, catering to diverse dietary needs.

Local Attractions: Belvedere Mansion is a 3-minute walk away, while Galena Historic District lies 800 metres nearby.
hotels.description_es:
Aldrich Guest House, en Galena, está a 26 km de Diamond Jo Casino y ofrece alojamiento con aire acondicionado y wifi gratis, además de acceso a la terraza.

Hay un baño privado con ducha en cada unidad, además de artículos de aseo gratuitos, secador de pelo y albornoces.

En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno vegetariano, vegano o sin gluten.

Después de un día de senderismo, esquí o ciclismo, la clientela puede relajarse en el jardín o el salón de uso común.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Belvedere Mansion, Galena Historic District y Galena-Jo Daviess County History Museum. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto regional de Dubuque) está a 36 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 10 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
Aldrich Guest House situa-se em Galena, a 26 km de Diamond Jo Casino, e dispõe de acomodações com ar condicionado e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, assim como acesso a um terraço.

Há uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro em cada unidade, assim como produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, um secador de cabelo e roupões de banho.

São oferecidas opções de pequeno-almoço vegetariano, vegan e sem glúten.

Depois de um dia a praticar caminhadas, esqui ou ciclismo, os hóspedes podem relaxar no jardim ou no salão partilhado.

Aldrich Guest House tem vários pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Belvedere Mansion, Galena Historic District e Galena-Jo Daviess County History Museum. O Aeroporto Regional Dubuque fica a 36 km da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
A 26 km da Diamond Jo Casino a Galena, Aldrich Guest House mette a disposizione una terrazza e alloggi climatizzati con WiFi gratuito

In ogni alloggio troverete anche un bagno privato con doccia, oltre a set di cortesia, asciugacapelli e accappatoi.

Presso la struttura potrete gustare una colazione vegetariana, vegana o senza glutine.

Dopo una giornata di escursioni, sugli sci, o in bici, potrete rilassarvi in giardino o nella sala comune.

I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di questo bed and breakfast includono Belvedere Mansion, Galena Historic District e Galena-Jo Daviess County History Museum. Aeroporto Regionale di Dubuque si trova a 36 km dalla struttura.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 10 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Masterpiece on Main 2
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Masterpiece on Main 2 vous accueille à respectivement 1,5 km et 1,5 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Casino Diamond Jo et National Mississippi River Museum and Aquarium. Il comprend une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et un casino. Cet appartement possède un balcon.

Cet appartement avec climatisation se compose de 2 chambres, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entièrement équipée avec un réfrigérateur, ainsi que de 1 salle de bains avec une douche et un sèche-cheveux. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont à votre disposition.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 24 km et 26 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : J Dubuque Monument et Belvedere Mansion. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport régional de Dubuque) est à 15 km.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Spacious Accommodation: Masterpiece on Main 2 in Dubuque offers a spacious apartment with two bedrooms and a living room. The property includes a balcony, patio, and dining area, providing ample space for relaxation and entertainment.

Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, and oven. Additional amenities include a washing machine, work desk, TV, and a tea and coffee maker.

Prime Location: Located 15 km from Dubuque Regional Airport, the apartment is an 18-minute walk from Diamond Jo Casino and 1.5 km from the National Mississippi River Museum and Aquarium. Nearby attractions include the Grand Opera House and an ice-skating rink.
hotels.description_es:
Masterpiece on Main 2 está a 18 min a pie de Diamond Jo Casino y a 1,5 km de National Mississippi River Museum and Aquarium, y dispone de wifi gratis y casino. Este apartamento ofrece alojamiento con balcón.

Este apartamento con aire acondicionado consta de 2 dormitorios, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada con nevera y 1 baño con ducha y secador de pelo. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el apartamento.

J Dubuque Monument está a 24 km del alojamiento, y Belvedere Mansion está a 26 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto regional de Dubuque) está a 15 km.

Este apartamento com ar condicionado tem 2 quartos, uma sala de estar, uma cozinha totalmente equipada com frigorífico, e 1 casa de banho com chuveiro e um secador de cabelo. Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas neste apartamento.

hotels.name: Flora House Denver
hotels.description_fr:
Le Flora House Denver est situé à Denver, dans le Colorado, à 3,3 km du centre de conventions du Colorado et à 4 km de la gare Union. Doté d'un jardin, cet hôtel 5 étoiles propose des chambres climatisées avec connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et salle de bains privative. Un parking privé gratuit est disponible et l'hôtel propose également un service de location de vélos si vous souhaitez explorer les environs.
Toutes les chambres disposent d'un bureau. Toutes les chambres sont équipées d'une machine à café. Certaines comprennent une kitchenette avec un réfrigérateur et un micro-ondes. Les logements du Flora House Denver sont équipés d'une télévision à écran plat et d'articles de toilette gratuits.
Un petit-déjeuner buffet, continental ou végétarien est servi sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Flora House Denver is set in Denver, Colorado, 3.3 km from the Colorado Convention Center and 4 km from Union Station. Featuring a garden, the 5-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. Free private parking is available, and the hotel also offers bike hire for guests who want to explore the surrounding area.
At the hotel, all rooms have a desk. All rooms come with a coffee machine, while selected rooms will provide you with a kitchenette with a fridge and a microwave. The units in Flora House Denver are equipped with a flat-screen TV and free toiletries.
A buffet, continental or vegetarian breakfast can be enjoyed at the property.
The accommodation offers a hot tub.
hotels.description_es:

También hay bañera de hidromasaje.

hotels.name: Patterson Inn
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Denver et offrant une vue sur la ville, l’établissement Patterson Inn propose un jardin, un salon commun, une terrasse et un bar. La connexion Wi-Fi et le parking privé sont tous deux disponibles gratuitement.
Les hébergements sont dotés d’un coin salon avec une télévision à écran plat, ainsi que d’une salle de bains privative comprenant des articles de toilette gratuits, un sèche-cheveux et une douche. Certains logements disposent d’un balcon et/ou d’un patio.
Un petit-déjeuner américain, végétarien ou végétalien est servi sur place.
Vous pourrez pratiquer la randonnée et le ski dans les environs.
Vous séjournerez à proximité de ces lieux d’intérêt : Molly Brown House, Colorado History Museum et Colorado State Capitol.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodations: Patterson Inn in Denver offers adults-only rooms with garden or city views. Each room features air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the garden. The property includes a bar, lounge, and outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a spa bath, balcony, and fireplace.
Delicious Breakfast: A variety of breakfast options are available, including American, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free. Breakfast can be enjoyed in the room or outdoors.
Prime Location: Located 23 km from Denver International Airport, the inn is near attractions such as Molly Brown House (6-minute walk) and Colorado History Museum (less than 1 km). An ice-skating rink is also nearby.
hotels.description_es:
Patterson Inn está en Denver y cuenta con vistas a la ciudad, jardín, salón de uso común, terraza y bar. El bed and breakfast ofrece wifi y parking privado, ambos gratis.
Patterson Inn ofrece zona de estar con TV de pantalla plana y baño privado con artículos de aseo gratuitos, secador de pelo y ducha. Algunas unidades incluyen balcón y/o patio.
En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno americano, vegetariano o vegano.
Se puede practicar senderismo y esquí en los alrededores.
Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Casa de Molly Brown, Museo de Historia de Colorado y Colorado State Capitol. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Denver) está a 23 km.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,7 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
Fornecendo vista da cidade em Denver, Patterson Inn fornece acomodações, um jardim, um salão partilhado, um terraço e um bar. O acesso Wi-Fi e o estacionamento privado estão disponíveis gratuitamente em Patterson Inn.
O alojamento possui uma área de estar com televisão de ecrã plano e uma casa de banho privativa com produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, um secador de cabelo e chuveiro. Algumas unidades incluem varanda e/ou pátio.
Os hóspedes podem apreciar pequeno-almoço americano, vegetariano ou vegan no alojamento.
É possível praticar caminhadas e esqui nas proximidades.
Patterson Inn tem vários pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Molly Brown House, Museu de História do Colorado e Capitólio Estatal de Colorado.
hotels.description_it:
Patterson Inn si trova a Denver e prevede la vista sulla città, un giardino, una sala comune, una terrazza e un bar. Il WiFi gratuito è a disposizione in tutta la struttura e c’è un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.
Questo bed and breakfast offre un’area salotto con TV a schermo piatto e un bagno privato con set di cortesia, asciugacapelli e doccia. Alcune unità includono un balcone e/o un patio.
A colazione troverete opzioni americane, vegetariane o vegane.
Nelle vicinanze è possibile praticare l’escursionismo e lo sci.
I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di Patterson Inn includono Molly Brown House, Colorado History Museum e Colorado State Capitol. Aeroporto Internazionale di Denver si trova a 23 km di distanza.

hotels.name: Four Seasons Hotel Denver
hotels.description_fr:
Proposant un bar, une piscine sur le toit, un spa et centre de bien-être, ainsi qu'une cuisine raffinée, le Four Seasons Hotel Denver se trouve à 5 minutes à pied du centre de conventions du Colorado.
Les suites élégantes du Four Seasons Hotel Denver sont dotées de peignoirs moelleux, de chaussons, d'une station d'accueil pour iPod et d'une télévision par câble à écran plat. Certaines offrent une vue sur le centre-ville de Denver et les montagnes.
Un service de navette est assuré gratuitement dans un rayon de 4,8 km autour du Denver Four Seasons Hotel. Vous apprécierez par ailleurs le spa à service complet et ses massages, la possibilité de prendre vos repas en chambre, le service de concierge, ou encore la salle de sport.
hotels.description_en:
Featuring a rooftop pool, a spa and wellness centre and fine dining, this hotel is 5 minutes’ walk from Colorado Convention Center. Guests can also enjoy a drink at the bar.
Terry cloth bathrobes, slippers, an iPod docking station and a flat-screen cable TV are featured in each elegant suite. Select suites feature views of downtown Denver and the mountains at Four Seasons Hotel Denver.
A free shuttle service is offered within 4.8 km of Denver Four Seasons Hotel. A full service spa is featured and offers massage services. In-room dining, concierge services and a fitness centre are also offered.
Locally farmed ingredients are featured at the EDGE Restaurant onsite. American steakhouse cuisine is served in outdoor or indoor dining atmosphere at Denver Four Seasons Hotel.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Four Seasons Hotel Denver

Este hotel se encuentra a 5 minutos a pie del centro de convenciones de Colorado y ofrece piscina en la azotea, spa y centro de bienestar, excelentes restaurantes y un bar.

El hotel dispone de suites elegantes con albornoces de felpa, zapatillas, soporte para iPod y TV de pantalla plana por cable. Algunas suites del Four Seasons Hotel Denver tienen vistas al centro de Denver y a las montañas.

El Denver Four Seasons Hotel proporciona servicio gratuito de traslado en un radio de 4,8 km. Cuenta con spa de servicio completo, servicios de masaje, servicio de habitaciones, servicios de conserjería y centro de fitness.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Four Seasons Hotel Denver

Vous bénéficierez de la climatisation, d’une télévision à écran plat, ainsi que d’une salle de bains privative avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Certains hébergements possèdent également une terrasse. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport régional de Rapid City) est à 64 km.

About this property

Comfortable Accommodations: The Hotel Sturgis in Sturgis offers air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms, hypoallergenic bedding, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, refrigerator, and TV, ensuring a pleasant stay.

Convenient Facilities: Guests can enjoy a lounge, coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and meeting rooms. Additional amenities include a terrace, balcony, and patio with mountain or city views. Free on-site private parking is available.

Local Attractions: The hotel is 47 km from the Journey Museum, 21 km from the Adams Museum, and 48 km from Dinosaur Park. Rapid City Regional Airport is 64 km away. Nearby shops and the room cleanliness are highly rated by guests.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 10.

Algunas de las habitaciones también cuentan con terraza. En The Hotel Sturgis, las habitaciones cuentan con ropa de cama y toallas.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto regional de Rapid City) está a 64 km.

hotels.name: SpringHill Suites by Marriott Deadwood
hotels.description_fr:
Hôtel rénové en 2025 et en face du musée Days of '76.

Situé à côté du casino Cadillac Jack et du centre d'accueil Deadwood, Le SpringHill Suites by Marriott Deadwood propose un petit-déjeuner buffet gratuit, un casino et un marché sur place. Pour ceux qui cherchent à tenter leur chance, cet hôtel dispose de 22 tables de jeux de casino, d'une salle VIP de casino et de 250 machines à sous. Cet hôtel propose des chambres dotées d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et d'une télévision par câble. 

Toutes les chambres du SpringHill Suites by Marriott Deadwood comprennent un four micro-ondes, un mini-réfrigérateur et un plateau/bouilloire. Dotées d'un mobilier moderne, toutes les chambres comprennent également du matériel de repassage, un sèche-cheveux et un coffre-fort.
hotels.description_en:
Hotel remodeled in 2025 and across the street from the Days of '76 Museum.

Located adjacent to the Cadillac Jack's Casino and the Deadwood Welcome Center, SpringHill Suites by Marriott Deadwood provides a free breakfast buffet, a casino, and an onsite market. For those looking to try their luck, this hotel boasts 22 casino gaming tables, a casino VIP room, and 250 slot machines. This hotel features rooms with free Wi-Fi and cable TVs. 

A microwave, mini refrigerator and one-cup coffee-making facilities are offered in every guest room at SpringHill Suites by Marriott Deadwood. Featuring modern furnishings, each guest room also includes ironing facilities, a hairdryer, and an in-room safe.
hotels.description_es:

El Deadwood SpringHill Suites by Marriott cuenta con piscina cubierta de borde infinito y bañera de hidromasaje.
